cost_analysis.note: Backtest plays each suggestion against every historical draw.

prev_suggestions_performance.note: No draws occurred after suggestions were generated.

analysis.llm_summary: Selected top5 candidates have the highest scores and align well with the most frequent digits per position, especially in positions 1, 2, 3, 4, and 5. The top50 expands on these with close scores and digit patterns that reflect historical frequency trends, ensuring strong coverage of likely winning digits.
